task_completion.description: Connect to the 'demodb' database in OrientDB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio or console interface is visible, showing an active connection to the 'demodb' database.
Schema manager showing 'MonthlyStats' in the list of classes (preferably extending V/Vertex), or a successful execution of a 'CREATE CLASS MonthlyStats' query.

task_completion.description: Create the required properties with correct data types for the MonthlyStats class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schema properties view for 'MonthlyStats' showing 'Year' (Integer), 'Month' (Integer), 'TotalRevenue' (Double), and 'OrderCount' (Integer), or successful 'CREATE PROPERTY' queries.

task_completion.description: Create a UNIQUE index on the Year and Month properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Indexes tab in the schema manager showing a UNIQUE index covering both 'Year' and 'Month' for the MonthlyStats class, or a successful 'CREATE INDEX' query.

task_completion.description: Execute the query to aggregate data from Orders and insert it into MonthlyStats.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query editor showing an INSERT/SELECT statement that filters by Status='paid', groups by Year/Month, sums Price, and counts orders, along with a success message indicating records were inserted.

task_completion.description: Verify that the MonthlyStats class contains the aggregated records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Browse' view or 'SELECT * FROM MonthlyStats' query result showing multiple records with populated Year, Month, TotalRevenue, and OrderCount fields.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OrientDB database interface or console.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show OrientDB Studio (web interface) or a live database console, not just queries written in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used a dynamic query to aggregate and insert data rather than hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The query used to populate the data should be an INSERT ... SELECT ... or similar dynamic aggregation command, not manual INSERT statements with hardcoded numbers.

integrity.description: The queries were actually executed and succeeded.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for execution success messages, row counts, or execution times in the OrientDB interface, confirming the commands were run and not just typed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database: 'demodb'. Source Class: 'Orders' (~150 synthetic records). Target Class: 'MonthlyStats' (Vertex class). Required Properties: Year (INTEGER/LONG/SHORT), Month (INTEGER/LONG/SHORT), TotalRevenue (DOUBLE/FLOAT/DECIMAL), OrderCount (INTEGER/LONG/SHORT). Required Index: UNIQUE on (Year, Month). Aggregation Logic: Filter source data where Status='paid', group by the Year and Month extracted from the Date field, calculate the sum of Price as TotalRevenue, and count the orders as OrderCount.
